name: Swipe Reveal
mechanic: Drag your thumb across a pixelated cover to uncover the hidden image underneath. Clear enough to guess correctly and the loop closes with the payoff; clear too much and the reveal is wasted.

name: Mystery Box Stack
mechanic: Tap each box in a vertical stack to unwrap it; every box holds a clue tile that narrows the final item. Open the last box to solve the mystery and bank the set.

name: Next Episode
mechanic: Swipe up through micro-chapters; each ends on a two-choice beat that unlocks the next scene. The final chapter resolves the arc and the session closes instead of cliffhanging forever.
video_trick: cliffhanger chain with a real ending

name: Pattern Vault
conditioned_path: phone unlock pattern / lock-screen muscle memory
mechanic: Trace the hidden pattern across a grid of dots. Each correct unlock slides open a new secret panel; the third panel opens the vault and reveals the treasure inside.

name: Hidden Message
conditioned_path: "read the caption to the end" / cryptic text posts
mechanic: Tap scrambled letter tiles to flip them into the correct word order. The final sentence is the punchline; once it reads clean, the message is delivered and the loop closes.

name: Map Uncover
mechanic: Drag a flashlight across a dark map to reveal landmarks one by one. Find the hidden marked spot and the destination unlocks with a short payoff card.

name: Number Riddle
conditioned_path: only smart people solve this" puzzle posts
mechanic: A sequence flashes; tap the missing number before the timer runs out. Solving N sequences reveals the hidden meta-pattern that ties them all together.

name: Before After Wipe
mechanic: Drag a slider across a split image to reveal the after. Land the wipe inside the target reveal zone and the transformation payoff flashes; miss and you only get a tease.

name: Escape Tap
mechanic: Tap objects in a tiny room to find hidden clues. Each clue unlocks the next drawer; the key opens the door and the escape is complete.

name: Plot Twist
mechanic: Tap to choose the next story beat from two options. The third choice flips everything and reveals the twist ending; once it lands, the story is over.

name: Layer Peel
mechanic: Swipe to peel layers off a shape; each layer changes color and sound. Reach the center object and the final reveal plays with a satisfying bloom.

name: Code Breaker
mechanic: Tap digits on a keypad to crack a short code. Each correct digit reveals one word of the hidden message; the final word resolves the whole clue.

name: Shadow Guess
mechanic: A shadow slowly rotates; tap when you recognize the object before the full reveal. Faster correct guesses unlock harder silhouettes and end with a final master shape.

name: Recipe Reveal
mechanic: Swipe ingredients into a bowl in the right order. The final swipe bakes the dish and reveals what you made; wrong order gives a comedic fail but still closes the loop.

name: Maze Exit
mechanic: Drag one thumb through a maze from start to finish. Each correct turn reveals the next corridor; reaching the center shows the exit payoff and ends the run.
video_trick: will it find the way out

name: Question Flip
conditioned_path: answer in the comments" flip-card posts
mechanic: Tap cards to flip them; one hides the answer to the riddle at the top. Find the answer before you run out of flips and the card locks with the payoff.
video_trick: the answer is behind one card

name: Stack Spell
conditioned_path: building to a reveal" process videos
mechanic: Tap to stack blocks; each block adds a letter to a hidden word. The tower spells the answer that resolves the prompt at the top and the payoff lands.

name: Zoom Find
conditioned_path: zoom in on this" detail reveal posts
mechanic: Pinch to zoom into a busy photo. Find the hidden target detail and the image resolves into a surprising caption; the loop closes when the detail is found.

name: Quiet Reveal
mechanic: Swipe to peel translucent layers off a soft shape. Each layer reveals a warmer tone until the center object rests fully exposed; no timer, just the closed loop of the completed image.

name: Slow Scroll
conditioned_path: read the caption to the end" posts
mechanic: A short story advances one gentle tap at a time. The last line delivers the resolution, then the screen fades to close; the payoff lands and the session ends.
